prestazioni: Bosch CRD3.3 ECU remap with custom VR60 (5.0L V10 TDI) fueling maps for 450hp and 850Nm, utilizing a Motec M150 piggyback for precise rail pressure control (max 2,200 bar) and optimized pilot injection timing (0.5ms advance at 2,500 RPM)

Garrett GTB2260VK turbocharger upgrade (84mm compressor, 64mm turbine) with custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe, 4-inch stainless steel exhaust (MagnaFlow 19419), and Pierburg CWA 100 auxiliary water pump for sustained boost (2.2 bar peak, 1.8 bar cruise)

034 Motorsport VR60 V10 TDI-specific billet crankshaft pulley (6.5kg reduction), Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (clutch: Sachs MFZ 400, 1200Nm capacity), and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR) with upgraded wrist pins (22mm, DLC-coated) and ARP L19 head studs (190,000 psi)
estetica: Rieger Tuning Touareg V10 TDI widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl overlay for heat dissipation
H&R TRAK+ wheel spacers (30mm front, 35mm rear) paired with BBS RS-GT II 10.5x22 ET30 wheels (custom offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 R22 front, 325/25 R22 rear)

KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm drop) with Eibach ERS helper springs (200 lbs/in) and custom polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport, 95A durometer) for chassis rigidity
